content: iOS background recording: must enable Background Modes > Audio, AirPlay, PiP and use AVAudioSessionCategoryPlayAndRecord. Background recording being silently killed is a known issue (expo#16807) linked to system resource management, network conditions, or audio session interruptions. Use AVAudioSession.interruptionNotification and app lifecycle observers to detect and recover. iOS aggressively kills background apps under memory pressure (jetsam). iOS 13.2+ became more aggressive about killing background apps. Memory pressure is primary cause of background jettisoning.
